---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Lecturer

**University of Montreal**, Montréal, Canada

| Period | Course |
|---|---|
| 2024 – present | ECN 1000 — Introduction to Economics |

---

## Teaching Assistant

**University of Montreal**, Montréal, Canada

| Period | Course |
|---|---|
| 2023 – 2024 | ECN 1050 — Principles of Microeconomics |
| 2023 – 2024 | ECN 1075 — Principles of Macroeconomics |
| 2023 – 2024 | ECN 1700 — Statistics for Economists |
